QJPC.settings.removeGMSecrets.name: Hidden secrets for all PLAYERS
QJPC.settings.removeGMSecrets.hint: Removes hidden secrets from exported journal text for all PLAYERS.
QJPC.settings.returnHTMLtext.name: HMTL text
QJPC.settings.returnHTMLtext.hint: Returns the HTML Foundry saves and seen in the editor instead of plain text.
QJPC.settings.isCuratedText.name: Curated Text
QJPC.settings.isCuratedText.hint: Returns curated text. This means styling with spaces will be trimmed down.
QJPC.settings.isEmptyLineText.name: Remove empty lines
QJPC.settings.isEmptyLineText.hint: Removes any empty lines in the text. If you want to keep them for styling do not use this option.
QJPC.settings.isPageTitle.name: Include Page Title.
QJPC.settings.isPageTitle.hint: This will add the page title to the exported text.
QJPC.settings.returnMDtext.name: Render to Markdown
QJPC.settings.returnMDtext.hint: Renders the text of a journal page to markdown before clipboard export.
QJPC.controls.clipboard.label: Clipboard
QJPC.notifications.noJournalOpen: No currently opened or active journal window.
QJPC.warning.onlyOneAllowed: Only Markdown or HTML can be active at the same time. Switched to plain text export.
QJPC.settings.plaintext.name: Plain text
QJPC.settings.outputFormat.name: Output format
QJPC.settings.outputFormat.hint: The output format for the clipboard. Markdown will not be rendered by the Foundry rendere.
QJPC.settings.allowLimited.name: 'Limited rights' export
QJPC.settings.allowLimited.hint: Allows for the export of pages which have the 'limited' user right flag. Caution! this migth be very system specific.
QJPC.settings.isSecretObsidianCallout.hi: Returns Obsidian style Markdown callouts with the callout denominator '[!secret]' for secrets
QJPC.settings.isDetailsTagObsidianCallou: Returns Obsidian style Markdown callouts with the callout denominator '[!note]' for HTML details tags.
QJPC.settings.isBlockQuoteObsidianCallou: Returns Obsidian style Markdown callouts with the callout denominator '[!info]' for blockquotes.
QJPC.settings.secretsForGM.name: Hide Secrets for GM
QJPC.settings.secretsForGM.hint: Toggles the export of hidden secrets for the GM.
QJPC.settings.htmlStyleTag.name: Style CSS
QJPC.settings.htmlStyleTag.hint: Copy and paste any CSS you want to use for the html export here (without style tags). It will be added at the start of the html.
QJPC.settings.picturePathSearchFor.name: IMG path to replace
QJPC.settings.picturePathSearchFor.hint: Enter the string of the IMG path you want to search and replace for. Like for example the Foundry path 'assets'. Leave empty if not replacements shall take place.
QJPC.settings.picturePathReplaceWith.nam: IMG path to be replaced with
QJPC.settings.picturePathReplaceWith.hin: This is the IMG path you want to replace with. For example 'D:\Foundry14.363\Data\assets'. Leave empty if not replacements shall take place.
QJPC.settings.htmlFooter.name: HTML Footer
QJPC.settings.htmlFooter.hint: HTML Footer will be added at the end of the exported html. You need to include any tags you need.
QJPC.settings.htmlHeader.name: HTML Header
QJPC.settings.htmlHeader.hint: HTML Header will be added at the top of the exported html. You need to include any tags you need.
QJPC.settings.base64PictureExport.name: Export pictures in HTML
QJPC.settings.base64PictureExport.hint: Export pictures as base64 encoded data included as inline html. As long as this option is set no URL adjusment will be made. Instead the whole picture URL will be replaced by the picture.
QJPC.settings.outputChannel.name: Export Destination
QJPC.settings.outputChannel.hint: To which destination the exportet text shall be exported to. Standard is the clipboard.
QJPC.settings.channelClibboard.name: Clipboard
QJPC.settings.channelFile.name: File export
QJPC.settings.channelPrint.name: To Printer
